violations.text: The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout establishment ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors in kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
